slots.name: incoming_section
slots.notes: ID of the next section about to enter the viewport

slots.name: outgoing_section
slots.notes: ID of the current section about to exit the viewport

slots.name: divider_type
slots.notes: Type of physical boundary: flat, gradient-fade, svg-wave, skew-cut

slots.name: animation_behavior
slots.notes: Connecting motion: none, curtain-reveal, magnetic-pull, scale-stretcher

layout_variants.name: Gradient Color-Fade Bridge
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Resolves color harshness when two adjacent sections have high brightness contrast (e.g., Dark Slate to Light Beige). Creates a buffer zone (bridge zone) with a height of 100px to 160px using a smooth linear-gradient overlay fading from transparent to the next section's background color (var(--next-section-bg)). Avoid using rigid lines. Motion Spec: On scroll down, the gradient expands vertically. On scroll up: The buffer zone collapses and reverses colors smoothly to prevent flash/jitter.

layout_variants.name: Overlapping Curtain Depth Reveal
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: 3D stacking layered layout. The preceding section sits on top (z-index: 10) with a heavy bottom drop shadow (shadow-[0_24px_50px_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]). The following section is pinned underneath (z-index: 5, position: fixed or sticky at the bottom) acting as a sub-level viewport. Scroll-driven Motion: When scrolling to the end of the preceding section, it slides up and out of view, revealing the static section underneath (like opening a gift box or revealing a sticky footer). On scroll up: The preceding section slides back down to overlay the next section.

layout_variants.name: Skewed Diagonal Cut (Dynamic Energy)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Utilizes dynamic skew angles (skew-y from -3deg to -6deg) to split section boundaries. Ideal for transitions from Hero to Features Grid or CTA to Footer to inject strong, athletic, asymmetrical geometry. Motion Spec: The skewed section container slides vertically offset from the inner text content. On scroll: The skew angle eases slightly (from -6deg to -3deg) to minimize layout shifts while producing a springy effect.

layout_variants.name: Liquid SVG Wave Morph
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Employs a smooth SVG wave path (w-full, stroke-none) color-matched to both section backgrounds. Motion Spec: The liquid SVG path performs continuous fluid shape morphing via CSS keyframes. When scrolling past the boundary, the wave stretches vertically along the Y-axis (scaleY: 1.0 -> 1.4) and retracts on exit to simulate elastic liquid tension.

layout_variants.name: Magnetic Scroll Trigger Sync
layout_variants.description: Motion Spec: Coordinates the exit animation of the preceding section with the entrance of the following section. Driven by a single shared GSAP ScrollTrigger timeline. When the preceding section reaches 80% scroll height, floating elements (badges, images) are 'pulled' and fade out in the direction of the scroll. This inertial drag immediately pulls up the heading of the next section, removing static gaps.

layout_variants.name: Curtain Sweep (GSAP clipPath)
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Utilizes clipPath (polygon) masks to sweep and reveal the incoming section from left to right or top to bottom. Motion Spec: As scroll hits the intersection, the mask sweeps rapidly (duration: 1.2s, CustomEase 'hop') to unveil the next viewport like a scanning light beam.

layout_variants.name: Organic Hand-Drawn Sketch Overlap
layout_variants.description: UI Aesthetics: Breaks rigid straight boundaries by overlaying organic, hand-drawn sketch vectors (such as leaf sprouts, vine branches, cat paw prints, or cursive signatures). Centered horizontally with negative vertical margins (margin-y from -2rem to -3.5rem) and elevated z-index (z-index: 10) to overlap adjacent backgrounds. Employs double-stroke pencil sketching (cloning the master path with a secondary offset light pencil draft path) to simulate hand sketches. Motion Spec: Hand-drawn components fade in, scale (0.9 to 1.0), and rotate slightly (1deg to 3deg) triggered by scroll viewports. Cursive signatures use continuous single paths instead of separate block characters.

entrance.intent: Ensures section transition boundaries fade in smoothly, aligning with homepage hydration speeds to prevent render blocks or lag.

boundary_blend.intent: Calculates scroll coordinates to translate overlays offset from the viewport scroll speed (multiplier: 0.3), adding subtle parallax depth.

clip_path_scrub.intent: Clips the mask viewport tracking the user's scroll progress 100% to expand the reveal area of the next section.

guidelines.z_index_contract: Regulates clear layered z-indices: Section N (z-index: 10) -> Transition Bridge (z-index: 20) -> Section N+1 (z-index: 30) to prevent content occlusion.
guidelines.scroll_reverse_rule: Mandatory: All ScrollTrigger timelines at transition boundaries must set scroll_reverse: true (or toggleActions: 'play reverse play reverse') to reverse clips and transitions when scrolling up.
guidelines.negative_margin_y_overlap: Ensure organic overlap elements bleed past borders using negative vertical margins (e.g. -2rem). Do not declare overflow: hidden/clip on parent wrappers to prevent clipping.
guidelines.double_stroke_sketching: Replicate hand sketches via double-stroke pencil lines: master ink line strokeWidth='2.2px' (var(--foreground)) and pencil draft line strokeWidth='1.2px' (var(--border)) at opacity='0.75' translated by 1px.
guidelines.transition_reference_spec: Refer to reference/transitions.md for details on sprouts, vine branches, cat paw prints, cursive signatures, and bionic leaf waves.
